# cycloid_plugin_version (Data Source)

Look up a plugin version by name or artifact URL within a registry plugin.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `plugin_id` (Number) The ID of the registry plugin.
- `registry_id` (Number) The ID of the plugin registry.

### Optional

- `name` (String) The version name to look up. Mutually exclusive with `url`.
- `organization` (String) The organization canonical, defaults to the provider `default_organization`.
- `url` (String) The artifact URL to look up. Mutually exclusive with `name`.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the plugin version.
- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the plugin version.
- `status` (String) Processing status: `pending`, `processing`, `success`, or `failed`.
